case_title: RENATO F. ZAFRA VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SAN LUIS OBISPO COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-29-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. CASE TRANSFERRED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 12965(B) IS GRANTED. CASE WAS TRANSFERRED TO SAN LUIS OBISPO COUNTY. THE SPECIAL VENUE PROVISIONS OF GC SECTION 12965(B) SUPPLANT THE GENERAL RULE OF CCP SECTION 395. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
